query: SELECT id, name, email, openId, role, tenantId, teamRole, loginMethod, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Daniel%' OR name LIKE '%Lozano%' OR email LIKE '%daniel%' OR email LIKE '%lozano%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, name, email, openId, role, tenantId, teamRole, loginMethod, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Daniel%' OR name LIKE '%Lozano%' OR email LIKE '%daniel%' OR email LIKE '%lozano%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
